title: A Conversation on the Subway
content: During his usual commute home, Ethan noticed an older man sitting across from him reading a worn paperback novel. After several stops, the man looked up and casually commented on the rainy weather outside. What began as a simple conversation slowly turned into a long discussion about books, travel, and the strange loneliness of large cities. Ethan was surprised by how easily the conversation flowed despite them being complete strangers. Around them, passengers remained silent, absorbed in their phones and headphones while the subway moved beneath the city. When Ethan finally reached his station, the man smiled politely and wished him a good evening. The brief encounter stayed in Ethan’s mind long after he returned home that night.
